description: Post-process a combined search-results JSON array: deduplicate by DOI/title, rank by citations/year/relevance, filter by publication year, and format as json, markdown, or bibtex.
rules: Python standard library only — no network, no third-party packages
input is a JSON array of result objects (title/authors/year/doi/citations/...)
deduplication keys on DOI first, then title
formatted output is written to record_store as aggregated_results.<ext>
usage: Set RESULTS_JSON (path to the combined results JSON array). Optional: OUTPUT_FORMAT (json|markdown|bibtex, default markdown), RANK (citations|year|relevance), YEAR_START, YEAR_END, DEDUPLICATE (1 to enable). Output: aggregated_results.<ext>.
limitation: Does not perform any database search or web request; it only transforms a results array you already exported. Records lacking the keyed fields are passed through unchanged.
